func:
msg.query = `
SELECT TOP (1000)
    membersRewards_id,
    item,
    points,
    active,
    expiry,
    modified
FROM hCustomerMgt.dbo.membersRewards
WHERE 
    active = 1
    AND expiry >= CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
ORDER BY points ASC;
`;
return msg;

template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>Ube Card — Cashier Terminal</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,700;1,400&family=DM+Mono:wght@400;500&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/html5-qrcode" type="text/javascript"></script>
<style>
  :root{
    --ube:#6B3FA0;--ube-deep:#4A2470;--ube-dark:#2D1547;--ube-mid:#8B5CC0;
    --ube-light:#EDE5F8;--ube-pale:#F7F3FD;--gold:#D4A843;--gold-lt:#FBF3DF;
    --green:#1E7F4E;--green-lt:#E8F5EE;--red:#C0392B;--red-lt:#FDECEA;
    --amber:#A56300;--amber-lt:#FFF4DF;
    --ink:#1A1025;--ink2:#4A3860;--ink3:#8A78A0;--border:#E4DAF0;
    --bg:#F4F0FA;--white:#FFFFFF;--card-r:18px;--shadow:0 10px 28px rgba(45,21,71,.08);
  }
  *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
  html,body{height:100%}
  body{
    font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#F7F4FC 0%,#F1EBFA 100%);
    color:var(--ink);display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden
  }

  .topbar{
    min-height:64px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--ube-dark),#3A1A59 60%,#241236);
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:10px 20px;gap:12px;flex-shrink:0;
    border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08)
  }
  .topbar-left,.topbar-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap}
  .brand-badge{
    width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:12px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--ube),var(--ube-mid));
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:18px;color:#fff;box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.18)
  }
  .brand-meta{display:flex;flex-direction:column}
  .brand-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:#fff;font-size:19px;line-height:1.1}
  .brand-sub{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.56);letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase}
  .top-chip{
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:999px;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14);color:rgba(255,255,255,.86);font-size:12px;font-weight:600
  }
  .clock{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:13px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6)}
  .logout-btn{
    border:none;background:rgba(255,255,255,.11);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.16);
    color:#fff;border-radius:999px;padding:9px 14px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer
  }
  .logout-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.16)}

  .app{
    display:grid;grid-template-columns:380px minmax(460px,1fr) 380px;gap:16px;
    padding:16px;flex:1;overflow:hidden
  }

  .card{
    background:rgba(255,255,255,.94);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
    border:1px solid rgba(228,218,240,.95);border-radius:var(--card-r);box-shadow:var(--shadow);
    display:flex;flex-direction:column;min-height:0
  }
  .card-header{
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;
    padding:18px 18px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)
  }
  .card-title-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}
  .card-icon{
    width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:12px;background:var(--ube-light);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:18px
  }
  .card-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:18px;line-height:1.1}
  .card-sub{font-size:11px;color:var(--ink3);margin-top:3px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em}
  .card-body{padding:16px;overflow:auto;min-height:0}

  .left-col,.center-col,.right-col{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px;min-height:0}

  .lookup-tools{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px}
  .qr-launch{
    border:2px dashed var(--border);background:linear-gradient(180deg,#FBF9FE,#F7F2FD);
    border-radius:16px;padding:18px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;transition:.18s
  }
  .qr-launch:hover{border-color:var(--ube);background:linear-gradient(180deg,#F6F0FD,#EEE5FA)}
  .qr-launch.scanning{border-color:var(--ube);box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(107,63,160,.08)}
  .qr-big{
    width:54px;height:54px;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--ube),var(--ube-mid));
    color:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:24px;flex-shrink:0
  }
  .qr-text strong{display:block;font-size:15px}
  .qr-text span{display:block;margin-top:4px;font-size:12px;color:var(--ink3);line-height:1.45}
  .search-wrap{position:relative}
  .search-icon{position:absolute;left:14px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);font-size:16px;opacity:.7}
  .search-input{
    width:100%;padding:14px 14px 14px 42px;border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;
    background:var(--ube-pale);font-size:15px;outline:none;transition:.18s
  }
  .search-input:focus{border-color:var(--ube);background:#fff}
  .lookup-hint{font-size:12px;color:var(--ink3)}

  .member-shell{
    border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);position:relative;
    background:linear-gradient(145deg,#311456 0%,#542B84 48%,#6B3FA0 70%,#45206E 100%);
    color:#fff;display:none;box-shadow:0 14px 28px rgba(74,36,112,.2)
  }
  .member-shell.visible{display:block}
  .member-shell::before{
    content:'';position:absolute;width:240px;height:240px;border-radius:50%;
    border:36px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);right:-70px;top:-90px
  }
  .member-body{position:relative;padding:18px}
  .member-top{
    display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px;margin-bottom:14px
  }
  .member-status{
    display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;padding:7px 11px;border-radius:999px;
    background:rgba(30,127,78,.18);border:1px solid rgba(128,255,185,.22);
    color:#DDF9EA;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase
  }
  .member-actions-top{display:flex;gap:8px}
  .tiny-btn{
    background:rgba(255,255,255,.12);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);color:#fff;
    border-radius:999px;padding:7px 10px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer
  }
  .tiny-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.18)}
  .member-head{
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin-bottom:14px
  }
  .avatar{
    width:58px;height:58px;border-radius:18px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.12);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:23px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0
  }
  .member-name{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:25px;line-height:1.08}
  .member-id{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.09em;color:rgba(255,255,255,.52);margin-top:6px}
  .tier-pill{
    margin-top:8px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:5px 10px;border-radius:999px;
    background:rgba(212,168,67,.18);border:1px solid rgba(212,168,67,.36);font-size:10px;font-weight:800;color:#F6D98A;
    letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase
  }
  .member-grid{
    display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.2fr .9fr;gap:12px;margin-top:14px
  }
  .member-stat{
    background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:14px;padding:14px
  }
  .stat-label{font-size:10px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5)}
  .stat-value{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:34px;line-height:1;margin-top:6px}
  .stat-sub{font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.62);margin-top:7px}
  .member-warning{
    margin-top:12px;padding:11px 12px;border-radius:12px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.09);font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.82);line-height:1.45
  }

  .empty-state{
    border:1px dashed var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:28px 18px;text-align:center;color:var(--ink3);background:linear-gradient(180deg,#FCFBFE,#F8F4FD)
  }
  .empty-state .big{font-size:34px;margin-bottom:8px}
  .empty-state strong{display:block;color:var(--ink2);margin-bottom:4px}

  .status-banner{
    border-radius:16px;padding:14px 16px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#F9F5FE,#F1E8FB);
    border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap
  }
  .status-main strong{display:block;font-size:14px}
  .status-main span{font-size:12px;color:var(--ink3)}
  .kbd-hint{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap}
  .kbd{
    border:1px solid var(--border);background:#fff;padding:5px 9px;border-radius:10px;font-size:11px;color:var(--ink2);font-family:'DM Mono',monospace
  }

  .mode-switch{
    display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;padding:6px;background:#F1E9FB;border-radius:14px;border:1px solid var(--border)
  }
  .mode-btn{
    padding:13px 14px;border:none;border-radius:11px;background:transparent;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink2);cursor:pointer;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;transition:.15s
  }
  .mode-btn.active{
    background:#fff;color:var(--ube-dark);box-shadow:0 5px 16px rgba(74,36,112,.1)
  }

  .center-main{
    display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 310px;gap:16px;min-height:0;flex:1
  }
  .amount-panel,.summary-panel{
    border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:18px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#FEFDFF,#F9F6FD);padding:16px
  }
  .section-eyebrow{
    font-size:11px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--ink3);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px
  }
  .amount-display{
    background:#fff;border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:18px;padding:18px 18px 16px;box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.6)
  }
  .amount-line{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:8px}
  .peso{font-size:20px;color:var(--ink3)}
  .amount-value{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:42px;font-weight:500;color:var(--ink);letter-spacing:-1px;flex:1;min-width:0}
  .amount-sub{
    margin-top:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap
  }
  .pts-preview{
    display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:8px 11px;background:var(--ube-light);border-radius:10px;color:var(--ube-dark);font-size:13px;font-weight:700
  }
  .muted{font-size:12px;color:var(--ink3)}

  .quick-grid{
    display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;margin-top:12px
  }
  .quick-btn{
    padding:11px 10px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink2)
  }
  .quick-btn:hover{border-color:var(--ube);color:var(--ube)}
  .numpad{
    display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:10px;margin-top:14px
  }
  .num-btn{
    min-height:64px;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;
    font-size:24px;font-weight:500;color:var(--ink);cursor:pointer;transition:.12s;box-shadow:0 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.02)
  }
  .num-btn:hover{background:#FCFAFF;border-color:var(--ube)}
  .num-btn:active{transform:scale(.97)}
  .num-btn.zero{grid-column:span 2}
  .num-btn.alt{font-size:15px;color:var(--ink2)}
  .primary-action{
    width:100%;margin-top:14px;border:none;border-radius:16px;padding:16px 18px;font-size:16px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;
    background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--ube),var(--ube-deep));box-shadow:0 10px 24px rgba(107,63,160,.2)
  }
  .primary-action:hover{filter:brightness(.98)}
  .primary-action.gold{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#D4A843,#BE8E28);color:#4A2F00;box-shadow:0 10px 24px rgba(212,168,67,.24)}
  .primary-action:disabled{opacity:.45;cursor:not-allowed;box-shadow:none}

  .summary-grid{display:grid;gap:12px}
  .sum-box{
    border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;background:#fff;padding:14px
  }
  .sum-box .lbl{font-size:10px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--ink3);font-weight:700}
  .sum-box .val{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:28px;margin-top:6px}
  .sum-box .sub{font-size:12px;color:var(--ink3);margin-top:5px;line-height:1.45}
  .audit-note{
    border-radius:14px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#FFF8EC,#FFF4E0);border:1px solid #F1D7A2;padding:12px 13px;font-size:12px;color:#7B5612;line-height:1.5
  }

  .log-panel{flex:1;min-height:260px}
  .log-header-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
  .mini-pill{
    padding:5px 9px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:#fff;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink2);cursor:pointer
  }
  .mini-pill.active{background:var(--ube-light);border-color:#D6C2EE;color:var(--ube-dark)}
  .log-list{padding:14px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;overflow:auto}
  .log-item{
    background:linear-gradient(180deg,#FFF,#FBF9FE);border:1px solid var(--border);border-left:5px solid transparent;
    border-radius:14px;padding:12px 13px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:auto 1fr auto;gap:12px;align-items:start
  }
  .log-item.earn{border-left-color:var(--ube)}
  .log-item.redeem{border-left-color:var(--gold)}
  .log-symbol{
    width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:12px;background:var(--ube-light);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:18px
  }
  .log-item.redeem .log-symbol{background:#FFF4E3}
  .log-topline{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap}
  .log-name{font-size:14px;font-weight:700}
  .type-tag{
    padding:4px 8px;border-radius:999px;font-size:10px;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em
  }
  .type-tag.earn{background:var(--ube-light);color:var(--ube-dark)}
  .type-tag.redeem{background:#FFF1D8;color:#8A5D00}
  .log-detail{font-size:12px;color:var(--ink2);line-height:1.55;margin-top:6px}
  .log-meta{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:7px}
  .log-pts{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:20px;white-space:nowrap}
  .log-pts.plus{color:var(--ube)}
  .log-pts.minus{color:#B88311}
  .log-time{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;color:var(--ink3)}
  .log-empty{text-align:center;padding:34px 10px;color:var(--ink3);font-size:13px}

  .toast{
    position:fixed;left:50%;bottom:28px;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(90px);
    min-width:260px;max-width:min(92vw,560px);background:var(--ube-dark);color:#fff;border-radius:16px;
    padding:14px 16px;box-shadow:0 16px 40px rgba(45,21,71,.35);z-index:999;
    opacity:0;transition:.26s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:14px;font-weight:600
  }
  .toast.show{opacity:1;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)}
  .toast.success{background:var(--green)}
  .toast.error{background:var(--red)}
  .toast.warn{background:var(--amber)}

  .modal-bg{
    display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(33,16,56,.54);backdrop-filter:blur(4px);z-index:200;
    align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:18px
  }
  .modal-bg.open{display:flex}
  .modal{
    width:min(520px,100%);background:#fff;border-radius:24px;border:1px solid var(--border);
    box-shadow:0 30px 70px rgba(33,16,56,.3);overflow:hidden
  }
  .modal-head{
    padding:20px 22px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px
  }
  .modal-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:24px}
  .modal-sub{font-size:13px;color:var(--ink3);margin-top:5px;line-height:1.5}
  .modal-close{
    border:none;background:#F5F0FB;border:1px solid var(--border);width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:12px;cursor:pointer;font-size:18px;color:var(--ink2)
  }
  .modal-body{padding:18px 22px 22px}
  .modal-member{
    border-radius:16px;padding:14px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#F9F5FE,#F4ECFD);border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;align-items:center
  }
  .modal-member strong{display:block;font-size:16px}
  .modal-member span{font-size:12px;color:var(--ink3);font-family:'DM Mono',monospace}
  .modal-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-top:14px}
  .modal-box{
    border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;background:#fff;padding:14px
  }
  .modal-box .lbl{font-size:10px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--ink3);font-weight:700}
  .modal-box .val{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:29px;margin-top:6px}
  .field{margin-top:14px}
  .field label{display:block;font-size:11px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--ink3);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px}
  .field input{
    width:100%;padding:14px;border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;background:#FBFAFE;outline:none;font-size:15px
  }
  .field input:focus{border-color:var(--ube);background:#fff}
  .field.mono input{font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em}
  .field-note{font-size:11px;color:var(--ink3);margin-top:6px;line-height:1.45}
  .modal-actions{display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:18px}
  .secondary-btn,.confirm-btn{
    flex:1;border:none;border-radius:14px;padding:14px 16px;font-size:14px;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer
  }
  .secondary-btn{background:#F5F0FB;border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--ink2)}
  .confirm-btn{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--ube),var(--ube-deep));color:#fff}
  .confirm-btn.gold{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#D4A843,#C08E29);color:#4A2F00}
  .confirm-btn:disabled{opacity:.42;cursor:not-allowed}

  .scanner-shell{display:grid;gap:14px}
  #qr-reader{
    width:100%;overflow:hidden;border-radius:18px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);background:#120B1B;min-height:320px
  }
  #qr-reader video{border-radius:18px}
  .scan-note{
    font-size:13px;color:#E9DFFF;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);
    padding:12px 14px;border-radius:14px;line-height:1.5
  }
  .scanner-modal .modal{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#241236,#160C21);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.08)}
  .scanner-modal .modal-title,.scanner-modal .modal-sub,.scanner-modal .modal-close{color:#fff}
  .scanner-modal .modal-sub{color:rgba(255,255,255,.62)}
  .scanner-modal .modal-close{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.12)}
  .scanner-btns{display:flex;gap:10px}
  .scanner-btns button{
    flex:1;padding:13px 14px;border:none;border-radius:14px;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer
  }
  .scanner-stop{background:#fff;color:#2D1547}
  .scanner-demo{background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14);color:#fff}

  .login-screen{
    position:fixed;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(circle at top right,#5B2A92 0%,#2D1547 42%,#180C25 100%);
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:500;padding:20px;transition:opacity .35s
  }
  .login-screen.hidden{opacity:0;pointer-events:none}
  .login-box{
    width:min(420px,100%);background:rgba(255,255,255,.96);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);border-radius:28px;
    box-shadow:0 28px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.35);padding:34px 30px;position:relative;overflow:hidden
  }
  .login-box::before{
    content:'';position:absolute;width:220px;height:220px;border-radius:50%;border:42px solid rgba(107,63,160,.08);top:-88px;right:-66px
  }
  .login-brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:26px;position:relative}
  .login-brand-icon{
    width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:14px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--ube),var(--ube-mid));display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;font-size:20px
  }
  .login-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:28px}
  .login-sub{font-size:13px;color:var(--ink3);margin:7px 0 22px}
  .login-field{margin-bottom:14px;position:relative}
  .login-field label{display:block;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--ink3);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:7px}
  .login-field input,.login-field select{
    width:100%;padding:14px 15px;border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;background:#F8F4FD;outline:none;font-size:15px
  }
  .login-field input:focus,.login-field select:focus{background:#fff;border-color:var(--ube)}
  .login-field input[type=password]{letter-spacing:.16em;font-size:18px}
  .login-btn{
    width:100%;margin-top:6px;border:none;border-radius:15px;padding:15px 16px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--ube),var(--ube-deep));
    color:#fff;font-size:15px;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer
  }
  .login-error{min-height:18px;margin-top:10px;font-size:13px;color:var(--red);text-align:center}
  .login-footer{margin-top:18px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);font-size:12px;color:var(--ink3);text-align:center}

  .processing{position:relative;pointer-events:none;opacity:.8}
  .processing::after{
    content:'';width:16px;height:16px;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.45);border-top-color:#fff;border-radius:50%;
    position:absolute;right:14px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);animation:spin .7s linear infinite
  }
  .confirm-btn.gold.processing::after{border-color:rgba(74,47,0,.25);border-top-color:#4A2F00}
  @keyframes spin{to{transform:translateY(-50%) rotate(360deg)}}
  .pulse-success{animation:successGlow 1s ease}
  @keyframes successGlow{
    0%{box-shadow:0 0 0 rgba(30,127,78,0)}
    20%{box-shadow:0 0 0 6px rgba(30,127,78,.18)}
    100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 rgba(30,127,78,0)}
  }

  @media (max-width:1400px){
    .app{grid-template-columns:340px 1fr 340px}
    .center-main{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  }
  @media (max-width:1180px){
    body{overflow:auto}
    .app{grid-template-columns:1fr;overflow:visible}
    .center-main{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="topbar">
  <div class="topbar-left">
    <div class="brand-badge">🟣</div>
    <div class="brand-meta">
      <div class="brand-title">Ube Card — Cashier Terminal</div>
      <div class="brand-sub">Eng Bee Tin Loyalty System</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="topbar-right">
    <div class="top-chip" id="branch-name">📍 Select branch</div>
    <div class="top-chip" id="cashier-name-display">👤 Not signed in</div>
    <div class="clock" id="clock">--:--:--</div>
    <button class="logout-btn" onclick="doLogout()">Sign out</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="app">
  <div class="left-col">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-header">
        <div class="card-title-wrap">
          <div class="card-icon">🔎</div>
          <div>
            <div class="card-title">Member lookup</div>

          </div>

      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="lookup-tools">
          <div class="qr-launch" id="qr-launch" onclick="openScannerModal()">
            <div class="qr-big">📷</div>
            <div class="qr-text">
              <strong>Scan Ube Card QR</strong>
              <span>Open camera scanner and point it at the member QR code.</span>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="search-wrap">
            <span class="search-icon">🔍</span>
            <input class="search-input" type="text" id="search-input" placeholder="Mobile / Email / EBT-XXXXX"/>
          </div>

          <div class="lookup-hint">Press Enter to search. Shortcut: <strong>/</strong> focuses search.</div>

          <div class="member-shell" id="member-card">
            <div class="member-body">
              <div class="member-top">
                <div class="member-status">● Member loaded</div>
                <div class="member-actions-top">
                  <button class="tiny-btn" onclick="openScannerModal()">Rescan</button>
                  <button class="tiny-btn" onclick="clearMember()">Clear member</button>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="member-head">
                <div class="avatar" id="member-avatar">MS</div>
                <div>
                  <div class="member-name" id="mc-name">—</div>
                  <div class="member-id" id="mc-id">EBT-XXXXX</div>
                  <div class="tier-pill" id="mc-tier">⬡ Silver</div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="member-grid">
                <div class="member-stat">
                  <div class="stat-label">Available points</div>
                  <div class="stat-value"><span id="mc-pts">0</span></div>
                  <div class="stat-sub">Equivalent value: <strong id="mc-equiv">₱0</strong></div>
                </div>
                <div class="member-stat">
                  <div class="stat-label">Transaction status</div>
                  <div class="stat-value" style="font-size:22px">Ready</div>
                  <div class="stat-sub">Safe to proceed with earn or redeem.</div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="member-warning">
                Always verify the member name before confirming the transaction. This prevents posting points to the wrong account.
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="empty-state" id="empty-state">
            <div class="big">💳</div>
            <strong>No member selected</strong>
            Scan a QR code or search manually to begin a cashier transaction.
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="center-col">
    <div class="card" style="flex:1;min-height:0">
      <div class="card-header">
        <div class="card-title-wrap">
          <div class="card-icon">💰</div>
          <div>
            <div class="card-title">Transaction</div>
            <div class="card-sub">Fast cashier mode</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px;min-height:0">
        <div class="status-banner">
          <div class="status-main">
            <strong id="txn-status-title">Waiting for member</strong>
            <span id="txn-status-sub">Load a member first, then choose Earn or Redeem.</span>
          </div>
          <div class="kbd-hint">
            <div class="kbd">/ Search</div>
            <div class="kbd">F2 Earn</div>
            <div class="kbd">F3 Redeem</div>
            <div class="kbd">Esc Close</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="mode-switch">
          <button class="mode-btn active" id="mode-earn-btn" onclick="setMode('earn')">✦ Earn points</button>
          <button class="mode-btn" id="mode-redeem-btn" onclick="setMode('redeem')">★ Redeem points</button>
        </div>

        <div class="center-main">
          <div class="amount-panel">
            <div class="section-eyebrow" id="amount-eyebrow">Purchase amount</div>
            <div class="amount-display">
              <div class="amount-line">
                <span class="peso">₱</span>
                <div class="amount-value" id="amount-display">0</div>
              </div>
              <div class="amount-sub">
                <div class="pts-preview" id="pts-preview">+0 pts</div>
                <div class="muted" id="amount-note">Every ₱100 earns 1 point.</div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="quick-grid" id="quick-grid">
              <button class="quick-btn" onclick="setAmount(100)">100</button>
              <button class="quick-btn" onclick="setAmount(200)">200</button>
              <button class="quick-btn" onclick="setAmount(500)">500</button>
              <button class="quick-btn" onclick="setAmount(1000)">1000</button>
            </div>

            <div class="numpad" id="numpad">
              <button class="num-btn" onclick="numpad('1')">1</button>
              <button class="num-btn" onclick="numpad('2')">2</button>
              <button class="num-btn" onclick="numpad('3')">3</button>
              <button class="num-btn" onclick="numpad('4')">4</button>
              <button class="num-btn" onclick="numpad('5')">5</button>
              <button class="num-btn" onclick="numpad('6')">6</button>
              <button class="num-btn" onclick="numpad('7')">7</button>
              <button class="num-btn" onclick="numpad('8')">8</button>
              <button class="num-btn" onclick="numpad('9')">9</button>
              <button class="num-btn alt zero" onclick="clearAmount()">Clear</button>
              <button class="num-btn" onclick="numpad('0')">0</button>
              <button class="num-btn alt" onclick="numpad('del')">⌫</button>
            </div>

            <button class="primary-action" id="primary-action" onclick="primaryAction()" disabled>Load a member first</button>
          </div>

          <div class="summary-panel">
            <div class="section-eyebrow">Current transaction summary</div>
            <div class="summary-grid">
              <div class="sum-box">
                <div class="lbl">Active mode</div>
                <div class="val" id="sum-mode">Earn</div>
                <div class="sub" id="sum-mode-sub">Purchase amount earns loyalty points.</div>
              </div>
              <div class="sum-box">
                <div class="lbl">Member</div>
                <div class="val" id="sum-member">—</div>
                <div class="sub" id="sum-member-sub">No member selected yet.</div>
              </div>
              <div class="sum-box">
                <div class="lbl" id="sum-value-label">Purchase amount</div>
                <div class="val" id="sum-value">₱0</div>
                <div class="sub" id="sum-value-sub">Points to earn: 0</div>
              </div>
              <div class="audit-note">
                Reference number is required before confirmation. Use the official receipt or transaction reference for audit trail integrity.
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="right-col">
    <div class="card log-panel">
      <div class="card-header">
        <div class="card-title-wrap">
          <div class="card-icon">🧾</div>
          <div>
            <div class="card-title">Session log</div>
            <div class="card-sub"><span id="session-count">0</span> transaction(s) this session</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="log-header-right">
          <button class="mini-pill active" id="filter-all" onclick="setLogFilter('all')">All</button>
          <button class="mini-pill" id="filter-earn" onclick="setLogFilter('earn')">Earn</button>
          <button class="mini-pill" id="filter-redeem" onclick="setLogFilter('redeem')">Redeem</button>
          <button class="mini-pill" onclick="clearLog()">Clear</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="log-list" id="log-list">
        <div class="log-empty" id="log-empty">No transactions yet this session.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="modal-bg" id="earn-modal">
  <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-head">
      <div>
        <div class="modal-title">Confirm earn</div>
        <div class="modal-sub">Review the details below before posting points.</div>
      </div>
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('earn-modal')">×</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div class="modal-member">
        <div>
          <strong id="earn-modal-name">—</strong>
          <span id="earn-modal-member-id">EBT-XXXXX</span>
        </div>
        <div style="text-align:right;font-size:12px;color:var(--ink3)">
          <div><strong style="color:var(--ink2)">Branch:</strong> <span id="earn-modal-branch">—</span></div>
          <div><strong style="color:var(--ink2)">Cashier:</strong> <span id="earn-modal-cashier">—</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="modal-grid">
        <div class="modal-box">
          <div class="lbl">Purchase amount</div>
          <div class="val" id="earn-modal-amount">₱0</div>
        </div>
        <div class="modal-box">
          <div class="lbl">Points to earn</div>
          <div class="val" id="earn-modal-pts" style="color:var(--ube)">+0 pts</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="field mono">
        <label>Reference number <span style="color:var(--red)">*</span></label>
        <input type="text" id="earn-ref-input" placeholder="e.g. OR-2026-00123" maxlength="40" oninput="validateEarnForm()"/>
        <div class="field-note">Required. This should match the official receipt or transaction reference.</div>
      </div>

      <div class="modal-actions">
        <button class="secondary-btn" onclick="closeModal('earn-modal')">Cancel</button>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="modal-bg" id="redeem-modal">
  <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-head">
      <div>
        <div class="modal-title">Confirm redeem</div>

      </div>
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('redeem-modal')">×</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div class="modal-member">
        <div>
          <strong id="redeem-modal-name">—</strong>
          <span id="redeem-modal-member-id">EBT-XXXXX</span>
        </div>
        <div style="text-align:right;font-size:12px;color:var(--ink3)">
          <div><strong style="color:var(--ink2)">Branch:</strong> <span id="redeem-modal-branch">—</span></div>
          <div><strong style="color:var(--ink2)">Cashier:</strong> <span id="redeem-modal-cashier">—</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="modal-grid">
        <div class="modal-box">
          <div class="lbl">Available balance</div>
          <div class="val" id="redeem-modal-balance" style="color:var(--ube)">0 pts</div>
        </div>
        <div class="modal-box">
          <div class="lbl">Peso value</div>
          <div class="val" id="redeem-modal-balance-peso">₱0</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="field">
        <label>Points to redeem</label>
        <input type="number" id="redeem-pts-input" min="1" placeholder="Enter points" oninput="onRedeemInput(this.value)"/>
        <div class="field-note">Equivalent discount: ₱<span id="redeem-peso-preview">0</span> <span id="redeem-min-warn" style="color:var(--red);display:none"></span></div>
      </div>

      <div class="field mono">
        <label>Reference number <span style="color:var(--red)">*</span></label>
        <input type="text" id="redeem-ref-input" placeholder="e.g. OR-2026-00123" maxlength="40" oninput="validateRedeemForm()"/>
        <div class="field-note">Required. This should match the official receipt or transaction reference.</div>
      </div>

      <div class="modal-actions">
        <button class="secondary-btn" onclick="closeModal('redeem-modal')">Cancel</button>

<div class="modal-bg scanner-modal" id="scanner-modal">

    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div class="scanner-shell">
        <div id="qr-reader"></div>
        <div class="scan-note">
          Use HTTPS or localhost for camera access. Once a QR code is detected, member lookup will run automatically.
        </div>
        <div class="scanner-btns">
          <button class="scanner-stop" onclick="closeScannerModal()">Stop camera</button>
          <button class="scanner-demo" onclick="demoScan()">Demo scan</button>

      </div>

<div class="toast" id="toast"></div>

<div class="login-screen" id="login-screen">
  <div class="login-box">
    <div class="login-brand">
      <div class="login-brand-icon">🟣</div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:20px">Ube Card</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--ink3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em">Cashier Terminal</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="login-title">Sign in</div>
    <div class="login-sub">Enter your cashier credentials to continue.</div>

    <div class="login-field">
      <label>Branch</label>

        <option value="">Loading branches...</option>
      </select>

    <div class="login-footer">Eng Bee Tin · Ube Card Loyalty System</div>

<script>
  const API = '';

  let currentMember = null;
  let amountStr = '0';
  let redeemPts = 0;
  let currentMode = 'earn';
  let sessionToken = '';
  let loggedInUser = '';
  let loggedInBranch = '';
  let loggedInBranchName = '';
  let loggedInName = '';
  let qrScanner = null;
  let qrRunning = false;
  let toastTimer = null;
  let isProcessing = false;
  let logItems = [];
  let logFilter = 'all';

  function tick(){
    document.getElementById('clock').textContent =
      new Date().toLocaleTimeString('en-PH',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit',second:'2-digit'});
  }
  tick();
  setInterval(tick, 1000);

  function formatPeso(n){
    return '₱' + (parseInt(n || 0)).toLocaleString();
  }

  function getMemberDisplayName(m){
    if(!m) return '—';
    return `${m.first_name || ''} ${m.last_name || ''}`.trim();
  }

  function getInitials(name){
    const parts = String(name || '').trim().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
    if(parts.length === 0) return '—';
    return parts.slice(0,2).map(p => p[0].toUpperCase()).join('');
  }

  function updateTopbar(){
    document.getElementById('branch-name').textContent = loggedInBranchName ? `📍 ${loggedInBranchName}` : '📍 Select branch';
    document.getElementById('cashier-name-display').textContent = loggedInName ? `👤 ${loggedInName}` : '👤 Not signed in';
  }

  function updateMemberVisuals(){
    const hasMember = !!currentMember;
    document.getElementById('member-card').classList.toggle('visible', hasMember);
    document.getElementById('empty-state').style.display = hasMember ? 'none' : 'block';

    if(hasMember){
      const name = getMemberDisplayName(currentMember);
      document.getElementById('mc-name').textContent = name;
      document.getElementById('mc-id').textContent = currentMember.member_id || '—';
      document.getElementById('mc-tier').textContent = `⬡ ${currentMember.tier || 'Member'}`;
      document.getElementById('mc-pts').textContent = (currentMember.points || 0).toLocaleString();
      document.getElementById('mc-equiv').textContent = formatPeso(currentMember.points || 0);
      document.getElementById('member-avatar').textContent = getInitials(name);
    }
  }

  function updateStatusBanner(){
    const title = document.getElementById('txn-status-title');
    const sub = document.getElementById('txn-status-sub');

    if(!currentMember){
      title.textContent = 'Waiting for member';
      sub.textContent = 'Load a member first, then choose Earn or Redeem.';
      return;
    }

    if(currentMode === 'earn'){
      title.textContent = `Ready to earn for ${getMemberDisplayName(currentMember)}`;
      sub.textContent = 'Enter the purchase amount, then confirm with the receipt reference number.';
    } else {
      title.textContent = `Ready to redeem for ${getMemberDisplayName(currentMember)}`;
      sub.textContent = 'Choose how many points to redeem. 1 point = ₱1 discount.';
    }
  }

  function updateSummary(){
    document.getElementById('sum-mode').textContent = currentMode === 'earn' ? 'Earn' : 'Redeem';
    document.getElementById('sum-mode-sub').textContent =
      currentMode === 'earn'
        ? 'Purchase amount earns loyalty points.'
        : 'Member points convert to discount.';

    document.getElementById('sum-member').textContent = currentMember ? getMemberDisplayName(currentMember) : '—';
    document.getElementById('sum-member-sub').textContent = currentMember
      ? `${currentMember.member_id || '—'} · ${currentMember.tier || 'Member'}`
      : 'No member selected yet.';

    const amt = parseInt(amountStr) || 0;

    if(currentMode === 'earn'){
      const pts = Math.floor(amt / 100);
      document.getElementById('sum-value-label').textContent = 'Purchase amount';
      document.getElementById('sum-value').textContent = formatPeso(amt);
      document.getElementById('sum-value-sub').textContent = `Points to earn: ${pts}`;
    } else {
      document.getElementById('sum-value-label').textContent = 'Redeem value';
      document.getElementById('sum-value').textContent = `${redeemPts.toLocaleString()} pts`;
      document.getElementById('sum-value-sub').textContent = `Discount value: ${formatPeso(redeemPts)}`;
    }
  }

  function updateButtons(){
    const amt = parseInt(amountStr) || 0;
    const primary = document.getElementById('primary-action');

    if(isProcessing){
      primary.disabled = true;
      return;
    }

    if(!currentMember){
      primary.disabled = true;
      primary.textContent = 'Load a member first';
      primary.classList.remove('gold');
      return;
    }

    if(currentMode === 'earn'){
      const can = amt >= 100;
      primary.disabled = !can;
      primary.textContent = can ? 'Confirm earn transaction' : 'Minimum purchase is ₱100';
      primary.classList.remove('gold');
    } else {
      primary.disabled = false;
      primary.textContent = 'Open redeem form';
      primary.classList.add('gold');
    }
  }

  function updateAmountDisplay(){
    const amt = parseInt(amountStr) || 0;
    const pts = Math.floor(amt / 100);

    document.getElementById('amount-display').textContent = amt.toLocaleString();
    document.getElementById('pts-preview').textContent = currentMode === 'earn'
      ? `+${pts} pts`
      : `${redeemPts.toLocaleString()} pts = ${formatPeso(redeemPts)}`;

    if(currentMode === 'earn'){
      document.getElementById('pts-preview').style.display = 'inline-flex';
      document.getElementById('amount-note').textContent = 'Every ₱100 earns 1 point.';
    } else {
      document.getElementById('pts-preview').style.display = redeemPts > 0 ? 'inline-flex' : 'none';
      document.getElementById('amount-note').textContent = 'Redemption is handled inside the redeem form.';
    }

    updateSummary();
    updateButtons();
  }

  function setMode(mode){
    currentMode = mode;

    document.getElementById('mode-earn-btn').classList.toggle('active', mode === 'earn');
    document.getElementById('mode-redeem-btn').classList.toggle('active', mode === 'redeem');

    document.getElementById('amount-eyebrow').textContent = mode === 'earn' ? 'Purchase amount' : 'Redeem overview';
    document.getElementById('quick-grid').style.display = mode === 'earn' ? 'grid' : 'none';
    document.getElementById('numpad').style.display = mode === 'earn' ? 'grid' : 'none';

    if(mode === 'redeem'){
      amountStr = '0';
    }

    updateStatusBanner();
    updateAmountDisplay();
  }

  function setAmount(n){
    amountStr = String(parseInt(n || 0));
    updateAmountDisplay();
  }

  function clearAmount(){
    amountStr = '0';
    updateAmountDisplay();
  }

  function numpad(k){
    if(currentMode !== 'earn') return;

    if(k === 'del'){
      amountStr = amountStr.length > 1 ? amountStr.slice(0,-1) : '0';
    }else{
      if(amountStr === '0') amountStr = k;
      else if(amountStr.length < 8) amountStr += k;
    }
    updateAmountDisplay();
  }

  function primaryAction(){
    if(currentMode === 'earn') confirmEarn();
    else openRedeemModal();
  }

  async function lookupMember(id){
    const q = (id || document.getElementById('search-input').value || '').trim();
    if(!q) return;

    showToast('🔍 Looking up member...', '');
    try{
      const res = await fetch(`${API}/loyalty/member/${encodeURIComponent(q)}`);
      const data = await res.json();

      if(data.ok && data.member){
        setMember(data.member);
        showToast(`✓ Member loaded: ${getMemberDisplayName(data.member)}`, 'success');
      }else{
        clearMember(false);
        showToast('Member not found', 'error');
      }
    }catch(e){
      const demoMember = {
        member_id:'EBT-00247',
        first_name:'Maria',
        last_name:'Santos',
        tier:'Gold',
        points:3420
      };
      setMember(demoMember);
      showToast('✓ Demo member loaded', 'warn');
    }
  }

  function setMember(m){
    currentMember = m;
    document.getElementById('search-input').value = '';
    updateMemberVisuals();
    updateStatusBanner();
    updateSummary();
    updateButtons();
  }

  function clearMember(showMsg = true){
    currentMember = null;
    redeemPts = 0;
    amountStr = '0';
    updateMemberVisuals();
    updateStatusBanner();
    updateAmountDisplay();
    if(showMsg) showToast('Member cleared', '');
  }

  function highlightMemberCard(){
    const card = document.getElementById('member-card');
    if(!card.classList.contains('visible')) return;
    card.classList.remove('pulse-success');
    void card.offsetWidth;
    card.classList.add('pulse-success');
  }

  function showToast(msg, type){
    const t = document.getElementById('toast');
    t.textContent = msg;
    t.className = `toast show ${type || ''}`;
    clearTimeout(toastTimer);
    toastTimer = setTimeout(() => t.classList.remove('show'), 2600);
  }

  function closeModal(id){
    document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('open');
  }

  function setProcessing(btn, processing, text){
    if(!btn) return;
    if(processing){
      btn.dataset.originalText = btn.textContent;
      btn.textContent = text || 'Processing...';
      btn.classList.add('processing');
      btn.disabled = true;
    }else{
      btn.textContent = btn.dataset.originalText || btn.textContent;
      btn.classList.remove('processing');
    }
  }

  function confirmEarn(){
    if(!currentMember) return;

    const amt = parseInt(amountStr) || 0;
    if(amt < 100){
      showToast('Minimum purchase is ₱100', 'error');
      return;
    }

    const pts = Math.floor(amt / 100);
    document.getElementById('earn-modal-name').textContent = getMemberDisplayName(currentMember);
    document.getElementById('earn-modal-member-id').textContent = currentMember.member_id || '—';
    document.getElementById('earn-modal-branch').textContent = loggedInBranchName || loggedInBranch || '—';
    document.getElementById('earn-modal-cashier').textContent = loggedInName || loggedInUser || '—';
    document.getElementById('earn-modal-amount').textContent = formatPeso(amt);
    document.getElementById('earn-modal-pts').textContent = `+${pts} pts`;
    document.getElementById('earn-ref-input').value = '';
    document.getElementById('earn-confirm-btn').disabled = true;
    document.getElementById('earn-modal').classList.add('open');
    setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('earn-ref-input').focus(), 120);
  }

  function validateEarnForm(){
    const ref = (document.getElementById('earn-ref-input').value || '').trim();
    document.getElementById('earn-confirm-btn').disabled = ref.length < 1;
  }

  async function doEarn(){
    const btn = document.getElementById('earn-confirm-btn');
    const earnRef = (document.getElementById('earn-ref-input').value || '').trim();
    if(!earnRef){
      showToast('Reference number is required', 'error');
      return;
    }

    const amt = parseInt(amountStr) || 0;
    const pts = Math.floor(amt / 100);

    isProcessing = true;
    updateButtons();
    setProcessing(btn, true, 'Posting earn...');

    try{
      let newBalance;
      try{
        const res = await fetch(`${API}/loyalty/earn`, {
          method:'POST',
          headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
          body:JSON.stringify({
            member_id: currentMember.member_id,
            amount: amt,
            branch: loggedInBranch,
            ref_no: earnRef,
            cashier: loggedInName || loggedInUser
          })
        });
        const data = await res.json();
        if(!data.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Earn failed');
        newBalance = data.new_balance;
      }catch(err){
        newBalance = (currentMember.points || 0) + pts;
      }

      currentMember.points = newBalance;
      updateMemberVisuals();
      updateSummary();
      highlightMemberCard();

      addLog(
        'earn',
        getMemberDisplayName(currentMember),
        `Purchase ${formatPeso(amt)} · Ref: ${earnRef} · ${currentMember.member_id} · Cashier: ${loggedInName || loggedInUser}`,
        `+${pts}`,
        earnRef
      );

      closeModal('earn-modal');
      amountStr = '0';
      updateAmountDisplay();
      showToast(`✓ ${pts} point(s) added successfully`, 'success');
    }catch(e){
      showToast(e.message || 'Earn failed', 'error');
    }finally{
      isProcessing = false;
      setProcessing(btn, false);
      updateButtons();
    }
  }

  function openRedeemModal(){
    if(!currentMember) return;

    const bal = currentMember.points || 0;
    document.getElementById('redeem-modal-name').textContent = getMemberDisplayName(currentMember);
    document.getElementById('redeem-modal-member-id').textContent = currentMember.member_id || '—';
    document.getElementById('redeem-modal-branch').textContent = loggedInBranchName || loggedInBranch || '—';
    document.getElementById('redeem-modal-cashier').textContent = loggedInName || loggedInUser || '—';
    document.getElementById('redeem-modal-balance').textContent = `${bal.toLocaleString()} pts`;
    document.getElementById('redeem-modal-balance-peso').textContent = formatPeso(bal);
    document.getElementById('redeem-pts-input').value = '';
    document.getElementById('redeem-ref-input').value = '';
    document.getElementById('redeem-peso-preview').textContent = '0';
    document.getElementById('redeem-min-warn').style.display = 'none';
    redeemPts = 0;
    document.getElementById('redeem-confirm-btn').disabled = true;
    document.getElementById('redeem-modal').classList.add('open');
    setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('redeem-pts-input').focus(), 120);
    updateSummary();
    updateAmountDisplay();
  }

  function onRedeemInput(val){
    redeemPts = Math.max(0, parseInt(val) || 0);
    document.getElementById('redeem-peso-preview').textContent = redeemPts.toLocaleString();
    const bal = currentMember ? (currentMember.points || 0) : 0;
    const warn = document.getElementById('redeem-min-warn');

    if(redeemPts > bal){
      warn.style.display = 'inline';
      warn.textContent = ` · Exceeds balance (${bal.toLocaleString()} pts)`;
    }else{
      warn.style.display = 'none';
      warn.textContent = '';
    }

    validateRedeemForm();
    updateSummary();
    updateAmountDisplay();
  }

  function validateRedeemForm(){
    const bal = currentMember ? (currentMember.points || 0) : 0;
    const ref = (document.getElementById('redeem-ref-input').value || '').trim();
    document.getElementById('redeem-confirm-btn').disabled = !(redeemPts >= 1 && redeemPts <= bal && ref.length >= 1);
  }

  async function doRedeem(){
    const btn = document.getElementById('redeem-confirm-btn');
    const refNo = (document.getElementById('redeem-ref-input').value || '').trim();

    if(redeemPts < 1){
      showToast('Enter points to redeem', 'error');
      return;
    }
    if(redeemPts > (currentMember.points || 0)){
      showToast('Insufficient points', 'error');
      return;
    }
    if(!refNo){
      showToast('Reference number is required', 'error');
      return;
    }

    const redeemedNow = redeemPts;

    isProcessing = true;
    updateButtons();
    setProcessing(btn, true, 'Posting redeem...');

    try{
      let newBalance;
      try{
        const res = await fetch(`${API}/loyalty/redeem`, {
          method:'POST',
          headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
          body:JSON.stringify({
            member_id: currentMember.member_id,
            points: redeemedNow,
            branch: loggedInBranch,
            ref_no: refNo,
            cashier: loggedInName || loggedInUser
          })
        });
        const data = await res.json();
        if(!data.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Redeem failed');
        newBalance = data.new_balance;
      }catch(err){
        newBalance = (currentMember.points || 0) - redeemedNow;
      }

      currentMember.points = newBalance;
      updateMemberVisuals();
      updateSummary();
      highlightMemberCard();

      addLog(
        'redeem',
        getMemberDisplayName(currentMember),
        `${redeemedNow} pts redeemed = ${formatPeso(redeemedNow)} discount · Ref: ${refNo} · ${currentMember.member_id} · Cashier: ${loggedInName || loggedInUser}`,
        `-${redeemedNow}`,
        refNo
      );

      closeModal('redeem-modal');
      redeemPts = 0;
      updateAmountDisplay();
      showToast(`✓ ${redeemedNow} point(s) redeemed successfully`, 'success');
    }catch(e){
      showToast(e.message || 'Redeem failed', 'error');
    }finally{
      isProcessing = false;
      setProcessing(btn, false);
      updateButtons();
    }
  }

  function addLog(type, name, detail, pts, refNo){
    logItems.unshift({
      type,
      name,
      detail,
      pts,
      refNo,
      time: new Date().toLocaleTimeString('en-PH',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'})
    });
    renderLog();
  }

  function renderLog(){
    const list = document.getElementById('log-list');
    const items = logItems.filter(i => logFilter === 'all' ? true : i.type === logFilter);
    document.getElementById('session-count').textContent = logItems.length;

    if(items.length === 0){
      list.innerHTML = '<div class="log-empty" id="log-empty">No transactions yet for this filter.</div>';
      return;
    }

    list.innerHTML = items.map(item => `
      <div class="log-item ${item.type}">
        <div class="log-symbol">${item.type === 'earn' ? '✦' : '★'}</div>
        <div>
          <div class="log-topline">
            <div class="log-name">${escapeHtml(item.name)}</div>
            <div class="type-tag ${item.type}">${item.type}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="log-detail">${escapeHtml(item.detail)}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="log-meta">
          <div class="log-pts ${item.type === 'earn' ? 'plus' : 'minus'}">${item.pts} pts</div>
          <div class="log-time">${item.time}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    `).join('');
  }

  function setLogFilter(filter){
    logFilter = filter;
    document.getElementById('filter-all').classList.toggle('active', filter === 'all');
    document.getElementById('filter-earn').classList.toggle('active', filter === 'earn');
    document.getElementById('filter-redeem').classList.toggle('active', filter === 'redeem');
    renderLog();
  }

  function clearLog(){
    logItems = [];
    renderLog();
  }

  function escapeHtml(str){
    return String(str)
      .replace(/&/g,'&')
      .replace(/</g,'<')
      .replace(/>/g,'>')
      .replace(/"/g,'"')
      .replace(/'/g,''');
  }

  async function openScannerModal(){
    document.getElementById('scanner-modal').classList.add('open');
    await startQrScan();
  }

  async function closeScannerModal(){
    await stopQrScan();
    document.getElementById('scanner-modal').classList.remove('open');
  }

  async function startQrScan(){
    if(qrRunning) return;

    if(location.protocol !== 'https:' && location.hostname !== 'localhost' && location.hostname !== '127.0.0.1'){
      showToast('Camera needs HTTPS or localhost.', 'error');
      return;
    }

    try{
      if(!qrScanner) qrScanner = new Html5Qrcode('qr-reader');

      await qrScanner.start(
        { facingMode: 'environment' },
        { fps: 10, qrbox: { width: 240, height: 240 }, aspectRatio: 1.0 },
        async (decodedText) => {
          if(!decodedText) return;
          const scannedValue = String(decodedText).trim();
          await closeScannerModal();
          showToast(`✓ QR detected: ${scannedValue}`, 'success');
          lookupMember(scannedValue);
        },
        () => {}
      );

      qrRunning = true;
      document.getElementById('qr-launch').classList.add('scanning');
    }catch(err){
      console.error(err);
      showToast('Camera access failed. Allow permission and use HTTPS.', 'error');
    }
  }

  async function stopQrScan(){
    try{
      if(qrScanner && qrRunning) await qrScanner.stop();
    }catch(e){
      console.error('QR stop failed:', e);
    }finally{
      qrRunning = false;
      document.getElementById('qr-launch').classList.remove('scanning');
      const reader = document.getElementById('qr-reader');
      if(reader) reader.innerHTML = '';
      qrScanner = null;
    }
  }

  function demoScan(){
    closeScannerModal();
    lookupMember('EBT-00247');
  }

  async function doLogin(){
    const branch = document.getElementById('login-branch').value.trim();
    const barcode = document.getElementById('login-user').value.trim();
    const pass = document.getElementById('login-pass').value;
    const errEl = document.getElementById('login-error');

    if(!branch){ errEl.textContent = 'Please select a branch.'; return; }
    if(!barcode){ errEl.textContent = 'Please enter your staff barcode.'; return; }
    if(!pass){ errEl.textContent = 'Please enter your password.'; return; }

    errEl.textContent = 'Signing in...';

    try{
      const res = await fetch('/login', {
        method:'POST',
        headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
        body:JSON.stringify({ email: barcode, password: pass })
      });

      const data = await res.json();

      if(!res.ok || data.error){
        errEl.textContent = data.error || 'Invalid barcode or password.';
        document.getElementById('login-pass').value = '';
        document.getElementById('login-pass').focus();
        return;
      }

      const branchSel = document.getElementById('login-branch');
      const branchLabel = branchSel.options[branchSel.selectedIndex].textContent;

      sessionToken = data.token;
      loggedInUser = barcode;
      loggedInName = data.email;
      loggedInBranch = branch;
      loggedInBranchName = branchLabel;
      localStorage.setItem('ube_last_branch', branch);
      errEl.textContent = '';

      fetch('/loyalty/cashier/login', {
        method:'POST',
        headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
        body:JSON.stringify({ username: loggedInName, barcode, branch, group_id: data.group_id })
      }).catch(()=>{});

      updateTopbar();

      const screen = document.getElementById('login-screen');
      screen.classList.add('hidden');
      setTimeout(()=>screen.style.display='none', 350);
      showToast(`Welcome, ${loggedInName}`, 'success');
    }catch(e){
      errEl.textContent = 'Connection error. Please try again.';
    }
  }

  function doLogout(){
    if(sessionToken){
      fetch('/loyalty/cashier/logout', {
        method:'POST',
        headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
        body:JSON.stringify({ username: loggedInName, barcode: loggedInUser, branch: loggedInBranch })
      }).catch(()=>{});
    }

    closeScannerModal();
    sessionToken = '';
    loggedInUser = '';
    loggedInBranch = '';
    loggedInBranchName = '';
    loggedInName = '';
    clearMember(false);
    clearLog();
    updateTopbar();

    document.getElementById('login-user').value = '';
    document.getElementById('login-pass').value = '';
    document.getElementById('login-error').textContent = '';

    const screen = document.getElementById('login-screen');
    screen.style.display = 'flex';
    setTimeout(()=>screen.classList.remove('hidden'), 10);

    const savedBranch = localStorage.getItem('ube_last_branch') || '';
    if(savedBranch) document.getElementById('login-branch').value = savedBranch;
    document.getElementById('login-user').focus();
  }

  async function loadBranches(){
    const sel = document.getElementById('login-branch');
    if(!sel) return;

    try{
      const res = await fetch('/api/branches');
      const data = await res.json();
      const branches = Array.isArray(data) ? data : (data.branches || []);
      branches.sort((a,b) => (a.sorting || 0) - (b.sorting || 0));
      sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">— Select branch —</option>';

      branches.forEach(b => {
        const opt = document.createElement('option');
        opt.value = b.br_code;
        opt.textContent = `${b.store_name} (${b.br_code})`;
        sel.appendChild(opt);
      });

      const savedBranch = localStorage.getItem('ube_last_branch') || '';
      if(savedBranch) sel.value = savedBranch;
    }catch(e){
      sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">— Could not load branches —</option>';
      console.error('Branch load failed:', e);
    }
  }

  document.getElementById('search-input').addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    if(e.key === 'Enter') lookupMember();
  });

  document.getElementById('login-user').addEventListener('keydown', function(e){
    if(e.key === 'Enter'){
      e.preventDefault();
      document.getElementById('login-pass').focus();
    }
  });

  document.getElementById('login-pass').addEventListener('keydown', function(e){
    if(e.key === 'Enter'){
      e.preventDefault();
      doLogin();
    }
  });

  document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){
    const loginScreen = document.getElementById('login-screen');
    const loginOpen =
      loginScreen.style.display !== 'none' &&
      !loginScreen.classList.contains('hidden');

    const target = e.target;
    const tag = target && target.tagName ? target.tagName.toLowerCase() : '';
    const isTypingField =
      tag === 'input' ||
      tag === 'textarea' ||
      tag === 'select' ||
      (target && target.isContentEditable);

    if (isTypingField) {
      return;
    }

    if (loginOpen) return;

    if(e.key === '/'){
      e.preventDefault();
      document.getElementById('search-input').focus();
      document.getElementById('search-input').select();
      return;
    }

    if(e.key === 'Escape'){
      closeModal('earn-modal');
      closeModal('redeem-modal');
      closeScannerModal();
      return;
    }

    if(e.key === 'F2'){
      e.preventDefault();
      setMode('earn');
      return;
    }

    if(e.key === 'F3'){
      e.preventDefault();
      setMode('redeem');
      return;
    }

    if(currentMode === 'earn'){
      if(/^[0-9]$/.test(e.key)){
        e.preventDefault();
        numpad(e.key);
        return;
      }

      if(e.key === 'Backspace'){
        e.preventDefault();
        numpad('del');
        return;
      }

      if(e.key === 'Delete'){
        e.preventDefault();
        clearAmount();
        return;
      }

      if(e.key === 'Enter' && !document.getElementById('earn-modal').classList.contains('open')){
        e.preventDefault();
        primaryAction();
        return;
      }
    }
  });

  window.addEventListener('beforeunload', () => {
    if(qrScanner && qrRunning) qrScanner.stop().catch(()=>{});
  });

  updateTopbar();
  updateMemberVisuals();
  setMode('earn');
  renderLog();

  if(document.readyState === 'loading'){
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', loadBranches);
  }else{
    loadBranches();
  }

  document.getElementById('login-user').focus();
</script>
</body>
</html>

Eng Bee Tin
Data Privacy Agreement
Ube Card Loyalty Program

This Data Privacy Agreement explains how Hopia King Bakery / Eng Bee Tin Chinese Deli ("Company", "we", "our", or "us") collects, uses, stores, shares, and protects your personal data in relation to your registration and use of the Ube Card Loyalty Program ("Program"). By registering for or using the Program, you acknowledge and agree to the processing of your personal data in accordance with this Agreement and applicable laws and regulations.

Section 1

Personal Data We Collect

We may collect and process the following personal data:

  • Full Name
  • Mobile Number
  • Email Address (if provided)
  • Date of Birth (if provided)
  • Transaction and Purchase History
  • Loyalty Points, Rewards, and Redemption Records
  • Branch and transaction reference details related to earning or redemption activity
  • Device and app-related information, including push notification tokens, when applicable
Section 2

Purpose of Data Processing

Your personal data may be used for the following purposes:

  • Creating, maintaining, and managing your loyalty account
  • Recording points earned, points redeemed, and account balance
  • Processing rewards, discounts, and redemption transactions
  • Verifying your identity and account ownership
  • Responding to customer service inquiries and support concerns
  • Preventing fraud, abuse, unauthorized access, and suspicious activity
  • Performing internal reporting, analytics, and service improvement
  • Sending program-related notices and transactional communications
  • Sending promotional messages and offers, where allowed or separately consented to
We may send one-time passwords (OTP) and system alerts via SMS, push notifications, or email.
Section 3

Redemption Verification & Fraud Prevention

To protect both the customer and the Company, redemption activity may be subject to review and verification.

The Company reserves the right to require valid identification and verification before processing redemption transactions to prevent fraud and unauthorized use.

We may also keep transaction logs, audit records, branch details, timestamps, and reference numbers for security, investigation, dispute resolution, and compliance purposes.

Section 4

Data Sharing & Disclosure

We may share your personal data only when necessary and only with authorized parties such as:

  • Authorized employees, officers, and representatives of the Company
  • Accredited service providers supporting the Program, such as SMS, email, hosting, cloud, or system providers
  • Technology and payment-related partners as necessary to operate the Program
  • Government authorities or regulators when required by law, lawful order, or legal process
Affiliate Brands & Participating Establishments
Your data may also be accessed by other brands and establishments under or affiliated with the Company and their participating branches for loyalty, rewards, promotional, operational, and related purposes. These currently include, but are not limited to:
  • Mr. Ube Rice and Noodle House
  • The Great Buddha Cafe
  • Chuan Kee Chinese Fastfood
  • Cafe Mezzanine
  • Tea Brothers
  • Binondo Bites

The Company may add, remove, or change affiliate brands and participating establishments at any time. Data shared with these affiliates will be used in accordance with this Agreement and applicable data privacy laws.

We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
Section 5

Data Storage, Security & Protection

We implement reasonable and appropriate organizational, physical, and technical security measures to protect your personal data against accidental or unlawful destruction, alteration, disclosure, misuse, and unauthorized access.

  • Controlled access to systems and records
  • Authentication and account verification procedures
  • Secure servers, databases, and transmission methods where applicable
  • System monitoring, audit logs, and security reviews
Section 6

Data Retention

Your personal data will be retained only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes stated in this Agreement, to maintain your loyalty account, to resolve disputes, to enforce our policies, or to comply with legal, tax, accounting, and regulatory requirements.

When retention is no longer necessary, your data will be securely deleted, anonymized, or disposed of in accordance with applicable rules and internal procedures.

Section 7

Your Rights as a Data Subject

Subject to applicable law, you have the right to:

  • Be informed about the collection and use of your personal data
  • Access the personal data we hold about you
  • Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete personal data
  • Object to certain types of processing, where applicable
  • Request deletion, blocking, or restriction of your data, subject to legal limitations
  • Withdraw consent, where processing is based on consent
  • Lodge a complaint with the proper regulatory authority if you believe your rights have been violated
Section 8

Updates to This Agreement

The Company may update or revise this Data Privacy Agreement from time to time to reflect changes in business processes, system functionality, legal requirements, or security practices. The latest version will govern the processing of your data upon publication or implementation.

Acknowledgment

By registering for, accessing, or using the Ube Card Loyalty Program, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this Data Privacy Agreement and that your personal data may be collected and processed for the purposes stated above.
